# CWE-1392 vulnerable: default admin credentials
lang: go
file: CWE-1392-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

// CWE-1392: Use of Default Credentials.
// Vulnerable: bootstrap admin account always seeded with password "admin".

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type AdminUser struct {
	ID       uint
	Username string
	Password string
}

func BootstrapAdmin(db *gorm.DB) gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		rec := AdminUser{Username: "admin", Password: "admin"}
		if err := db.FirstOrCreate(&rec, AdminUser{Username: "admin"}).Error; err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"admin_ready": true})
	}
}
